pyacs.message package

Submodules

pyacs.message.debug_message module

pyacs.message.debug_message.debug_message(str)[source]

print message if log level is DEBUG and log to file if configured

pyacs.message.error module

pyacs.message.error.error(str, exit=False)[source]

print error message and optionally exit, also log to file if configured

pyacs.message.get_logger module

pyacs.message.get_logger.get_logger(log_file)[source]

pyacs.message.message module

pyacs.message.message.message(ustr, level=0)[source]

print message and log to file if configured

pyacs.message.verbose_message module

pyacs.message.verbose_message.verbose_message(str)[source]

print message if global variable verbose is True and log to file if configured

pyacs.message.warning module

pyacs.message.warning.warning(str)[source]

print warning message and log to file if configured
